segment.source: Renders a navigation bar with brand name, menu links, and an optional outline-style call-to-action button, styled see-through so it floats over a hero or full-bleed background image. Use it for: image-led landing page headers, campaign pages where the menu should blend into the opening visual. Pair it with 'Hero Section' or 'Header Banner'; prefer 'Navigation Bar' on pages with a plain background.
